articles.title: Hindalco stock in focus as Novelis restarts New York hot mill: UBS remains bullish on aluminium
articles.summary: UBS maintained a Buy rating on Hindalco Industries with an INR 1,325 target price representing 28–29% upside from mid-June levels, citing renewed confidence in Novelis’s recovery trajectory following the Oswego, New York hot mill restart.

articles.title: SACA, a new coalition, debuts to support growth of recycled aluminium production in the US
articles.summary: The Secondary Aluminum Coalition for America (SACA), representing scrap collection, remelting, extrusion and fabrication companies across 17 US states, conducted a Washington fly-in to meet White House, DOE, ITA, USTR and Congressional officials, presenting secondary aluminium as the fastest and lowest-cost path to expanding US domestic supply; the sector accounts for more than 97% of US aluminium industry employment.
articles.novelis_angle: As the world’s largest aluminium recycler and a major US secondary producer, Novelis stands to benefit from any policy framework that prioritises recycled-content incentives over primary capacity—directly supporting the economics of the Bay Minette greenfield.

articles.title: Aluminum drops to three-month low on weak China data, supply uncertainty
articles.summary: LME aluminium fell to a three-month low on 16 June after weaker-than-expected Chinese economic data heightened demand concerns; prices were also pressured by investor uncertainty over whether the US-Iran peace deal will deliver sustained Middle East supply restoration.
